title: Database Priority Refinement — 2 Primary, 1 Backup, 3 Held
replaces: Phase 32 v1 plan to run all 6 databases
change: Only 2 databases active initially. Reason: QFINHUB has 0 clicks, 503 discovered-not-indexed. Must prove quality indexing before expanding.

PRIMARY_1.name: Loan Payment Database (DB3)
reason_selected: Clearest query templates — '$X loan at Y% for Z years'
Already has GSC impression signal for '$20 000 loan monthly payment'
Lowest tax/legal complexity — just payment math
Parent calculator is one of few pages with impressions (4 imp, pos 7.0)

PRIMARY_2.name: Mortgage Affordability Database (DB2)
reason_selected: Strong query template — 'can I afford $X house on $Y salary'
High user intent — people actively researching affordability
Parent calculator has impressions (3 imp, pos 4.3)
Clear formula: 28% DTI rule is standard
Natural link to mortgage calculator for deeper exploration
PRIMARY_2.variables: home price × salary × down payment × rate

BACKUP.name: Compound Interest Scenario Database (DB5)
BACKUP.status: HOLD — activate only if PRIMARY databases prove indexing works
BACKUP.activation_criteria: PRIMARY databases show >= 40% indexing rate AND >= 1 content click within 30 days
reason_held: Competes with government sites (Investor.gov) and authority calculators
Parent calculator ranks pos 6.7 but 0 clicks — needs CTR fix first
Many existing compound interest calculators on the web

HELD_1.name: Salary Reality Database (DB1)
reason_held: Requires state-specific tax brackets for all 50 states
High tax/legal complexity — wrong numbers have real consequences
Must verify tax data accuracy before publishing
Build after PRIMARY databases prove the model works

HELD_2.name: FIRE / Retirement Reality Database (DB4)
reason_held: Complex multi-variable calculations (savings + contributions + withdrawal rate + lifespan)
High YMYL sensitivity — retirement advice is heavily scrutinized
Parent calculator has improving impressions (14 imp) but pos 77.8 still deep

HELD_3.name: Debt Payoff Database (DB6)
reason_held: Query volume likely lower than loan/mortgage
Strategy comparison (snowball vs avalanche) adds complexity
Can be built after loan database validates the template approach
Good candidate for Month 2 if gates pass

activation_rules.PRIMARY_only_now: Only Loan Payment and Mortgage Affordability databases are active
activation_rules.BACKUP_activation: Compound Interest activates only after: PRIMARY shows 40%+ indexing + 1+ content click
activation_rules.HELD_activation: Salary, FIRE, Debt Payoff activate only after: PRIMARY databases prove 40%+ indexing + 5+ content clicks + Auditor approval
activation_rules.never_activate_all_at_once: At most 3 databases active simultaneously. Must kill underperformers before adding new ones.
